title: Labor-Market Research, Role Families, and Data Limits · Claim Audit: Source Provenance
summary: A candidate follows viral title and salary lists that mix countries, seniority, occupations, posting windows, and unsupported predictions. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the source provenance increment in dated labor-market evidence brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data.
Distinguish occupations, job titles, functions, industries, products, seniority, and employment arrangements when mapping possible work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Source Provenance · Theory Source Provenance
steps.instruction:
theory case — A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Source Provenance contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Source Provenance · Theory Source Provenance.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data. For Predict Source Provenance · Theory Source Provenance, keep Source Provenance connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Source Provenance condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: CareerOneStop Salary Finder — Controls location- and occupation-specific compensation research while requiring total-package, source-date, sample, and local-law caveats.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Source Provenance while producing dated labor-market evidence brief.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The worked example variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data. A defensible solution applies Source Provenance, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to dated labor-market evidence brief.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-source-provenance — Record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-5
focus: career-source-provenance
decision-evidence: Record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A current webpage necessarily contains current data. This fails the Source Provenance contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: CareerOneStop Salary Finder (May 2024 OEWS estimates; reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls location- and occupation-specific compensation research while requiring total-package, source-date, sample, and local-law caveats.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data.
